title: Bump to v5.8.0
body:
As the title says

Include "action required" if users need to take action when upgrading.

comments.body:
ah macos worker runs on go 1.26 which the golangcu-lint version doesn't understand in the older version on this branch, not sure we want to backport the lint fixes, https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/28037 and https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/27473 (this one is not safe to backport for sure).

Easy way out disable linting for macos on this branch? Seem the best option IMO and not like linting macos is critical
```
diff --git a/.cirrus.yml b/.cirrus.yml
index f9e6e7c576..836283b005 100644
--- a/.cirrus.yml
+++ b/.cirrus.yml
@@ -295,8 +295,6 @@ osx_alt_build_task:
     # This host is/was shared with potentially many other CI tasks.
     # The previous task may have been canceled or aborted.
     prep_script: &mac_cleanup "contrib/cirrus/mac_cleanup.sh"
-    lint_script:
-        - make golangci-lint
     basic_build_script:
         - make .install.ginkgo
         - make podman-remote
```
tmt tests failed for commit 07efc23e05c3d9aa15a0f30d57194737bfc4b6b1. @lsm5, @psss, @thrix please check.
tmt tests failed for commit 37bfeded1f9df9577b138cbad90a5da95fdf9b89. @lsm5, @psss, @thrix please check.
